questions.question: James says the testing of faith produces what?
questions.feedback: The testing of your faith produces perseverance.

questions.question: James compares a person who doubts to what?
options: A wave of the sea driven by the wind
questions.correct: A wave of the sea driven by the wind
questions.feedback: The doubter is like a wave of the sea, blown and tossed by the wind.

questions.question: James says God tempts people with evil.
questions.feedback: God cannot be tempted by evil, nor does he tempt anyone.

questions.question: Everyone should be quick to listen, slow to speak, and slow to become _____.
questions.feedback: Be quick to listen, slow to speak, and slow to become angry.

questions.question: If anyone lacks _____, let him ask God who gives generously to all without reproach.
questions.feedback: If anyone lacks wisdom, ask God who gives generously.
